---

This is called an inventory close, where we move down or offer to move down a model. Would you consider this product, the product right underneath this, it would save you $500, a thousand, maybe $1,500. It'll reduce your payments 12 to about $25 or $30 a month. Or would you rather get exactly what you want and pay a little more each month?
